name: helmfile (Declarative Helm Chart Management)

auth.notes: Uses kubeconfig and helm credentials for chart repositories

performance.notes: Helm deployment speed; parallel releases with --concurrency

agent_readiness.notes: Declarative multi-release Helm management. helmfile.yaml defines releases, values, environments. helmfile sync (deploy all). helmfile diff (preview changes). helmfile apply (sync only changed). Environments: helmfile -e production sync. helmfile template (render manifests). Secrets via helm-secrets plugin (SOPS). Parallel deployment: --concurrency 5. Selectors: helmfile -l tier=frontend sync. The missing glue layer for multi-chart Kubernetes deployments.

gotchas: helmfile.yaml syntax can be complex for large deployments
Drift detection less sophisticated than ArgoCD/Flux
helm-secrets plugin required for secret management
best_when: Managing multiple Helm charts as a coherent deployment
CI/CD pipelines deploying many Helm charts
avoid_when: Single chart deployments (direct helm install simpler)
Full GitOps with reconciliation (use ArgoCD or Flux)
summary: helmfile manages multiple Helm chart releases declaratively. helmfile.yaml defines all releases + values + environments. helmfile sync/diff/apply/template. Environment overlays for staging/production. Parallel deployment. helm-secrets for SOPS-encrypted values. The glue layer between raw helm commands and full GitOps (ArgoCD/Flux). Good for teams wanting declarative multi-chart management without CD operator complexity.
